html:
Key Room

Exclusive to:
When entering the Key Room, there are 4 Pulse Cradle and 4 Ancient Tower in the center of the room.

Contents

  • 1 Pulse Cradle
  • 2 Ancient Tower
  • 3 Reliquary
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Gallery

Pulse Cradle

“A spark of energy could revitalize it.”

-

The Pulse Cradle can be found in the center of the Key Room in a group of 4. Each Pulse Cradle requires a Security Pulse to activate. Player can use Waymark Compass to attract Pulses or use Spark Ark to store the Pulses and transfer them to the Pulse Cradles.

Once all 4 Security Pulses have been inserted, the Ancient Towers awaken and transform into Ancient Guard Towers. At the same time, the Security Pulses sink into the ground and are replaced by Levers, which can be used to summon Lustrous Weevils.

Ancient Tower

Once all 4 Security Pulses have been inserted, the Ancient Towers awaken and transform into Ancient Guard Towers, revealing the Lustrous Socket that can be used to placed Lustrous Weevils.

Reliquary

GenericPicked

“Maybe this one will help you get home.”

-

After all four Lustrous Weevils have been placed into their sockets, a Reliquary rises from the center, allowing the Keystone to be retrieved. Once the Keystone is taken, the Reliquary retreats and is replaced by the Sanctum Smithy. A Chasm leading to the Ancient Orchestrina also appears.

Trivia

  • The Key Room was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Gallery

  • Key Room in trailer.

Key Room
Exclusive to:
When entering the Key Room, there are 4 Pulse Cradle and 4 Ancient Tower in the center of the room.
Contents
1 Pulse Cradle
2 Ancient Tower
3 Reliquary
4 Trivia
5 Gallery
Pulse Cradle[edit | edit source]
Pulse Cradle
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_key_activator"
“There's an idea that's sparked in my mind...”
–Wilson
“Huh. Looks like something's supposed to go in there.”
–Willow
“Has place for putting something inside.”
–Wolfgang
“It's lost something important...”
–Wendy
“POWER SOURCE REQUIRED”
–WX-78
“This small alcove is lined with a metallic substance, as if to conduct an electrical current...”
–Wickerbottom
“Hm. Looks like something's meant to go inside.”
–Woodie
“What might those moon worshippers have used for power?”
–Maxwell
“There art sömething missing... but what?”
–Wigfrid
“It looks like it's missing a piece.”
–Webber
“There is an important ingredient missing.”
–Warly
“Oh? Need something...”
–Wormwood
“Huh. Looks like it's meant to hold some kind of power source.”
–Winona
“It's missing that special spark, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Something round go inside?”
–Wurt
“It looks like something fits inside. Woby and I are on the case!”
–Walter
“It needs something... oh botheration, what was it...?”
–Wanda
“A spark of energy could revitalize it.”
-
The Pulse Cradle can be found in the center of the Key Room in a group of 4. Each Pulse Cradle requires a Security Pulse to activate. Player can use Waymark Compass to attract Pulses or use Spark Ark to store the Pulses and transfer them to the Pulse Cradles.
Once all 4 Security Pulses have been inserted, the Ancient Towers awaken and transform into Ancient Guard Towers. At the same time, the Security Pulses sink into the ground and are replaced by Levers, which can be used to summon Lustrous Weevils.
Ancient Tower[edit | edit source]
Ancient Tower
Source
Spawns
Miscellaneous
"vault_pillar_guard_dormant"
“It's a tower.”
–Wilson
“What good is a tower that doesn't burn?”
–Willow
“Ancient tower looks mighty.”
–Wolfgang
“They seem to stand vigil over something.”
–Wendy
“STRUCTURALLY SOUND”
–WX-78
“At first glance, it appears little more than an ornate pillar.”
–Wickerbottom
“No, Luce. I don't think you could.”
–Woodie
“Lucky it's just an inanimate tower.”
–Maxwell
“A förmidable structure.”
–Wigfrid
“So tall! Hope it doesn't fall on us!”
–Webber
“That is a bold design.”
–Warly
“Tall rock friend”
–Wormwood
“They sure built 'em to last back then.”
–Winona
“That's what I call tall!”
–Wortox
“Nice horns, florp!”
–Wurt
“That sure is some neat architecture!”
–Walter
“There's something about these...”
–Wanda
Once all 4 Security Pulses have been inserted, the Ancient Towers awaken and transform into Ancient Guard Towers, revealing the Lustrous Socket that can be used to placed Lustrous Weevils.
Reliquary[edit | edit source]
Reliquary
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_key_pedestal"
GenericPicked
“There's the key to it all.”
–Wilson
“Looks like trouble... Think I'll take it.”
–Willow
“Time for Wolfgang to claim prize!”
–Wolfgang
“There it is...”
–Wendy
“I CLAIM IT”
–WX-78
“The measures employed to contain it suggest the key is of no small importance.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's there for the taking.”
–Woodie
“No turning back now.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis my böunty tö claim.”
–Wigfrid
“Can we take it?”
–Webber
“An ominous centerpiece!”
–Warly
“Scared to take”
–Wormwood
“I've got an uneasy feeling about this.”
–Winona
“I see a key!”
–Wortox
“Mine!”
–Wurt
“It's so mysterious!”
–Walter
“I never thought I'd see this again.”
–Wanda
“It's empty.”
–Wilson
“And it's gone!”
–Willow
“Nothing there for Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“I feel we have set off an irreversible chain of events.”
–Wendy
“IT HAS BEEN CLAIMED”
–WX-78
“The key has been taken.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's gone.”
–Woodie
“It's already been taken.”
–Maxwell
“There is nöught.”
–Wigfrid
“It's gone!”
–Webber
“It has been taken!”
–Warly
“Gone”
–Wormwood
“Yup, it's empty.”
–Winona
“It's been taken! Shall we be foresaken?”
–Wortox
“Gone.”
–Wurt
“I sure that key wasn't cursed!”
–Walter
“Now we've done it.”
–Wanda
“Maybe this one will help you get home.”
-
After all four Lustrous Weevils have been placed into their sockets, a Reliquary rises from the center, allowing the Keystone to be retrieved. Once the Keystone is taken, the Reliquary retreats and is replaced by the Sanctum Smithy. A Chasm leading to the Ancient Orchestrina also appears.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Key Room was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Key Room in trailer.

Tóm tắt

Khi vào Key Room sẽ có 4 Pulse Cradle và 4 Ancient Tower ở giữa phòng.
